schema.title: Employee-Federal-Tax-Rev2020
schema.description: Federal tax information for employees using the revised 2020 W4 form.

version.description: The current version of the object. See the [versioning guide](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/idempotency) for information on how to use this field.

employee_id.description: The internal ID of the employee.

company_id.description: The internal ID of the company.

filing_status.description:
It determines which tax return form an individual will use and is an important factor in computing taxable income. One of:
- Single
- Married
- Head of Household
- Exempt from withholding

extra_withholding.description: An employee can request an additional amount to be withheld from each paycheck.

two_jobs.description: If there are only two jobs (i.e., you and your spouse each have a job, or you have two), you can set it to true.

dependents_amount.description: A dependent is a person other than the taxpayer or spouse who entitles the taxpayer to claim a dependency exemption.

deductions.description: Deductions other than the standard deduction to reduce withholding.
